retry_reason: The function does not return an error indicator; on internal failure (e.g., reservation) it silently returns. The put itself is unconditional when reached and never fails.
contract_summary: Release the buffer object associated with a framebuffer during plane state cleanup. This function unpins the bo and then drops one reference via amdgpu_bo_unref. The caller must provide a valid drm_plane_state with a non-NULL fb. After calling, the bo may be freed if its reference count reaches zero. The function does not transfer ownership; it releases ownership. Callers must not use the bo after this call.
